modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Phish Alert Button is missing in the shared mailbox.

full_description_text: I was trying to report a phishing email but couldn't find the button. It just wasn't there in the shared mailbox. This is really frustrating because I wanted to do my part.
short_description: Phish Alert Button is missing in the shared mailbox.
description: I was trying to report a phishing email but couldn't find the button. It just wasn't there in the shared mailbox. This is really frustrating because I wanted to do my part.
